title: Athrixia heterophylla
taxonomy: Athrixia heterophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Athrixia, which is native to the region of southern Africa. The plant is further classified as a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as everlasting daisies. This classification places Athrixia heterophylla within the larger family of composite flowers. The exact classification of Athrixia heterophylla is a result of ongoing research and scientific classification in the field of botany.
